name: Stroopwafels
description: Thin waffle cookies filled with caramel syrup, best enjoyed warm over a cup of coffee. A beloved Dutch treat since 1784.

name: Gouda Cheese (Aged)
description: Rich, nutty aged Gouda from the famous cheese city. Matured for 18 months with deep amber color and crystalline texture.

name: Tulip Bulbs (Mixed)
description: A curated selection of 20 premium tulip bulbs in red, yellow, and purple. Grown in the legendary Keukenhof region.

name: Traditional Wooden Clogs
description: Handcrafted poplar wood klompen with hand-painted floral motifs. Functional footwear that doubles as a conversation starter.

name: Delft Blue Cat
description: Hand-painted Delft Blue ceramic cat figurine in traditional cobalt and white. Each piece is unique, crafted by Royal Delft artisans.

name: Dutch Licorice (Drop)
description: Assorted Dutch drop in sweet, salty, and double-salt varieties. The true test of whether you're ready for Dutch culture.

name: Amsterdam Bike Bell
description: Classic chrome bicycle bell engraved with the Amsterdam coat of arms. Essential equipment for navigating the city's bike lanes.

name: Hagelslag (Chocolate Sprinkles)
description: Premium dark chocolate sprinkles for your morning bread. Yes, the Dutch eat sprinkles on toast for breakfast. It's magnificent.

name: Miniature Windmill
description: Detailed wooden replica of a traditional Dutch windmill with rotating blades. Hand-assembled from sustainably sourced timber.

name: Bitterballen (Frozen, 24pc)
description: Crispy fried meat ragout balls, the ultimate Dutch bar snack. Serve with mustard and cold beer for authentic gezelligheid.
